payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Rectangular black metal fireplace insert with a matte surround and a dark, mostly empty interior revealing a partial curved gas log or burner; front trim shows soot and scuff marks and the top edge of the surround appears slightly cropped in the image; approximate distance to camera ~1.5 meters.
